data.body: Update loom/knots_sdlc/prompts/*.md to match the updated skills/*.md content. Affected files: implementation.md, shipment.md, shipment_review.md, implementation_review.md. Ensure frontmatter (accept, success, failure, params) remains valid and body text matches the delivery-target-explicit language from the skills update. The {{ output }} template variable should produce correct text when rendered for both remote_main and pr modes.
data.title: Align loom prompts with updated skills prompts
